{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ config.title }} — {{ config.description }}{% endblock title %} {% block content %}

Unifly

Your UniFi Network, at Your Fingertips

28 commands, 10 TUI screens, triple-path API engine. Manage your entire UniFi network from the terminal, or have an AI agent do it for you.

Get Started GitHub
⚡

Triple-Path API Engine

Integration API + Session API via a single API key, plus Site Manager cloud fleet and connector support. One engine, every endpoint.

📊

10-Screen TUI

btop-inspired dashboard with area-fill traffic charts, CPU/MEM gauges, zoomable topology, and live event streaming.

🧠

28 Top-Level Commands

Devices, clients, networks, WiFi, firewall, NAT, DNS, VPN, DPI, cloud fleet, topology, raw API passthrough, and more.

🔒

Secure Credentials

OS keyring by default for API keys and passwords. Plaintext config available as an opt-in fallback.

🌐

Multi-Profile

Named profiles for multiple controllers with instant switching. Great for managing home, office, and remote sites.

🤖

AI Agent Skill

Ships with a skill bundle that teaches coding agents to provision VLANs, audit firewalls, and diagnose connectivity.

{% endblock content %}
